sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_test (index UInt64, resolution UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY index;
SELECT h3ToParent(index, resolution) AS parent FROM h3_test;
UPDATE h3_test SET resolution = 4 WHERE index = 599405990164561919;
SELECT index, h3ToParent(index, resolution) AS parent FROM h3_test WHERE resolution = 4;
